justification: The diff correctly updates the Java version to 21 and removes redundant @Autowired annotations in favor of constructor injection, which is a good anti-pattern clearance. However, it includes significant spurious churn by modifying build artifacts (target/ directory) and changing dependency coordinates (mysql-connector-java to mysql-connector-j, hibernate-core groupId change) without clear justification for the migration scope. The diff lacks any actual Java 21 idioms like records, pattern matching, or virtual threads.
